answers.body: This answer explains the possibility of the error. And the answers to the question provides more details about the error. This link provides a solution which will fix when the error happens when the connection is timed out.

title: Axis web service client error
body:
One of our customers faced this error while calling our web service.

I think this is because a connection problems from his side, but I need to know the exact reason.

Stack trace:

Error while calling 10108831-402TV04LF from Thread 1 occurred after 511441
